message:
fix: use textContent for tips, add prefers-reduced-motion support (#5905)

- Switch tip rendering from innerHTML to textContent and remove HTML
  tags from tip strings to prevent XSS if tips ever become configurable
- Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block to disable spinner,
  star twinkle, tip fade animations for accessibility

Fixes #5904

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
